_meta.name: D4 pivot: A2-Tool mixed-corpus retrain — completed, FAILED gate

status: COMPLETED_BUT_FAILED_GATE — corpus expansion + retrain executed successfully, eval avg_score 0.5722 still below 0.85 threshold; D4 stays FAILED per 70B handoff plan (r9+pathc remains 14B production).

strategy_chosen.description: Dilute the existing 50-example deterministic tool corpus with broad instruction-following data from corpus_alm_70b.jsonl (option b) rather than scaling up option a synthetic tool templates alone. Preserves tool-call JSON exposure (250 copies of 50 seed) while saturating the LoRA with general Korean instruction-following to prevent narrow collapse.
strategy_chosen.layout: tool_head(125 lines) + broad_head(3000 lines) + tool_tail(125 lines)
strategy_chosen.why_hybrid: Option a alone (scaling synthetic tool templates) would repeat same 10 categories × more copies — still narrow semantic space. Option b alone kills tool-call syntax exposure. Hybrid fixes D6 post-mortem constraint: tool byte ratio <5%, broad dilution >=3MB, steps/tool example <=3.

corpus_stats.schema_handling: Python loader auto-detects per line (tool schema → ChatML format with <tool_call> tags; ChatML → plain system+user+assistant)

training.pod_action: reused existing A1/A2-Orch/A2-Tool pod (idle GPU, 28GB hf_cache + 28GB a1_merged_base + 15GB ckpts pre-staged)

loss_trajectory.step_100: eval Korean email generation WORKING (verbose coherent)

training.eval_generation_at_step_100: 제목: [완료] 모델 훈련이 완료되었습니다\n\n안녕하세요...  (coherent Korean email — distinct from narrow tool-call collapse of previous run)

evaluation.serve_process: serve_a2_tool_mixed_eval.py on pod tmux session serve_a2t_mixed, cuda_mem 29.69GB

email.note: worst — A2-Orch merge seems to corrupt Korean email tone

root_cause_analysis.hypothesis_1_proven_wrong: A2-Tool LoRA overfit on 50-example corpus was the sole cause
root_cause_analysis.hypothesis_1_evidence: Mixed corpus with 4.7% tool ratio + 300 steps produced 0.5722 — essentially identical to 50-example × 1500-step overfit (0.5667). If overfit were the sole cause, diluted training would have recovered to baseline 0.8111.
root_cause_analysis.hypothesis_2_likely: The A1+A2-Orch merged base ITSELF is the regression root — not A2-Tool LoRA
hypothesis_2_evidence: Email domain avg_score dropped to 0.3667 (worst) — suggests the A2-Orch 3000-step Orch-OR LoRA merge degraded Korean email competency in A1-merged base
r9 model (separate lineage, not A1→A2-Orch chain) hit 0.8111 baseline + 0.9444 with pathc — implies the r9 base is healthier than A1+A2-Orch merged base
A2-Tool LoRA contribution is small (r=32 attn-only) — diluting its training corpus barely moved the needle (+0.0055), confirming it's NOT the dominant regression factor

Per-domain pattern: email/schedule are the two Korean-formality-heavy domains — both regress hardest, consistent with A2-Orch Orch-OR loss (consciousness signal) disrupting register/formality fidelity
root_cause_analysis.hypothesis_3_secondary: corpus_alm_70b.jsonl broad samples come from KMMLU/KoBEST which are multiple-choice/classification, NOT open-generation — may not teach the long-form Korean email/schedule generation that hire_sim requires
root_cause_analysis.hypothesis_3_evidence: 3000 broad lines but only KoAlpaca + CarrotAI + OpenAssistant_guanaco_ko (~38 of first 100) are true open-generation. KMMLU+KoBEST (~62 of first 100) are MC questions — teaching the model to answer '2번' rather than produce coherent emails.

d4_gate_status_after_work.production_path_14b: r9 base + pathc prompt prefix (0.9444 avg_score PASS) — unaffected by this pivot
d4_gate_status_after_work.70b_track_rationale: Per shared/state/alm_70b_launch_ready_20260417.json#next_session_handoff: D4 failure does NOT block 70B because the 70B uses FRESH Qwen2.5-72B-Instruct base with new FSDP LoRA — NOT the 14B A1+A2-Orch+A2-Tool chain. 14B adapter lineage is metadata-only in 70B. Remaining 70B blockers: D7 USER_OK_4POD, D8 CLM r4 slot, D9 72B download, D10 4-pod alloc.
d4_gate_status_after_work.ablation_value: This retrain is registered as an ablation: confirms corpus expansion alone cannot recover A1+A2-Orch degradation. The A2-Tool ckpt at r2:anima-models/alm14b/a2_20260417_tool_mixed/step_300/ is HOLD for ablation records only.

next_recommended_pivot.priority_1: Ablation isolating A2-Orch contribution — re-eval A1-merged-only (drop A2-Orch adapter from serve) to confirm A2-Orch is the regression driver
next_recommended_pivot.priority_1_cmd: On pod: edit serve to skip PeftModel.from_pretrained(model, A2_ORCH_ADAPTER) step, re-run hire_sim_lenient. If avg_score jumps back toward 0.8, A2-Orch is the root cause.
next_recommended_pivot.priority_2: If A2-Orch is confirmed as the regression: rerun A2-Orch training with phi_holo_consistency_weight lowered (0.01 → 0.003) or replaced with dual-loss (CE + 0.1 × orch_loss) to prevent consciousness-signal optimization from overwriting register/formality.
next_recommended_pivot.priority_3: Replace corpus_alm_70b.jsonl open-generation subset (KoAlpaca+CarrotAI+guanaco ≈ 40%) with 100% open-generation Korean — build a filtered subset that excludes KMMLU + KoBEST MC lines.
next_recommended_pivot.cost_estimate: Priority 1: $0 (CPU eval, reuse pod). Priority 2: $18 (A2-Orch rerun 12h). Priority 3: $0 (local corpus filter).
next_recommended_pivot.decision: Recommend Priority 1 FIRST (cost-free diagnostic) before committing to Priority 2's 12h retrain. 70B track proceeds in parallel regardless.
